ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the site belongs to */,
  "site_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site manager */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Area of the site in square meters */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mix_designs" (
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mix design */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the mix design belongs to */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the mix design is used at */,
  "mix_description" TEXT /* Description of the mix design */,
  "cement" REAL /* Amount of cement (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "blast_furnace_slag" REAL /* Amount of blast furnace slag (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "fly_ash" REAL /* Amount of fly ash (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "water" REAL /* Amount of water (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "superplasticizer" REAL /* Amount of superplasticizer (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "coarse_aggregate" REAL /* Amount of coarse aggregate (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "fine_aggregate" REAL /* Amount of fine aggregate (kg in a m^3 mixture) */,
  "age_days" INTEGER /* Age of the concrete (days) */,
  "compressive_strength" REAL /* Compressive strength of the concrete (MPa) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mix design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mix design was last updated */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., structural, non-structural) */,
  "mix_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the mix design */,
  "mix_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the mix design */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the mix design */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the mix design was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_designs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_designs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mix_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mix design */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the mix design */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_versions_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES mix_designs ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mix design being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "compressive_strength" REAL /* Compressive strength of the concrete (MPa) */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES mix_designs ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Cost of the material per unit */,
  "material_grade" TEXT /* Grade or quality of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "supplier_status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mix_materials" (
  "mix_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mix-material association */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mix design */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used in the mix */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the material */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Cost of the material used in the mix */,
  "material_grade" TEXT /* Grade or quality of the material used in the mix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mix_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_materials_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES mix_designs ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_sites" (
  "project_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-site association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sites_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mix design */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mix design being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mix design was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the mix design */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES mix_designs ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assurance record */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mix design being QA'd */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date the QA was conducted */,
  "qa_result" TEXT /* Result of the QA (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qa_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the QA */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the QA */,
  "qa_location" TEXT /* Location where the QA was conducted */,
  "qa_method" TEXT /* Method used for the QA */,
  "qa_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the QA was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assurance_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES mix_designs ("mix_id")
)
